title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLVI. Relics.
content:
Blenky my nutty-cock,
                        Blenk him away;
                    My nutty-cock's never
                        Been blenk'd to-day.
        What wi' carding and spinning on't wheel,
        We've never had time to blenk nutty-cock weel;
        But let to-morrow come ever so sune,
        My nutty-cock it sall be blenk'd by nune.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCLVI. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
